title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Betsson (USA) Financial Investment Management Co., Ltd
body: "Application number 5316  Applicant Betsson AB objected to the name used by Betsson (USA) Financial Investment Management Co., Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 19 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Betsson (USA) Financial Investment Management Co., Ltd is changed to 15979207, Ltd. "
